test-method.name: testAddCustomerFormIsVisible
test-method.description: Add customer form should be visible after navigating to Add Customer tab

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithInvalidData
test-method.description: Attempt to add a customer with invalid input; form should reject or show validation

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithInvalidData
test-method.description: Attempt to add a customer with invalid input; form should reject or show validation

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithInvalidData
test-method.description: Attempt to add a customer with invalid input; form should reject or show validation

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithInvalidData
test-method.description: Attempt to add a customer with invalid input; form should reject or show validation

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithInvalidData
test-method.description: Attempt to add a customer with invalid input; form should reject or show validation

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithValidData
test-method.description: Add a new customer with valid first name, last name, and post code

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithValidData
test-method.description: Add a new customer with valid first name, last name, and post code

test-method.name: testAddCustomerWithValidData
test-method.description: Add a new customer with valid first name, last name, and post code

test-method.name: testSubmitButtonIsEnabled
test-method.description: Submit button should be enabled when the form is displayed

test-method.name: testCreateAccountForExistingCustomer
test-method.description: Create a bank account for an existing customer with each supported currency

test-method.name: testCreateAccountForExistingCustomer
test-method.description: Create a bank account for an existing customer with each supported currency

test-method.name: testCreateAccountForExistingCustomer
test-method.description: Create a bank account for an existing customer with each supported currency

test-method.name: testCustomerAndCurrencyDropdownsWork
test-method.description: Verify customer and currency dropdowns are selectable

test-method.name: testOpenAccountFormIsVisible
test-method.description: Open Account form should be visible after clicking the Open Account tab

test-method.name: testCustomersListTableIsVisible
test-method.description: Customers list table is visible on the Customers tab

test-method.name: testDeleteCustomerRemovedFromList
test-method.description: Add a customer, then delete them and verify removal from the list

test-method.name: testPreSeededCustomersExist
test-method.description: Customer list shows at least one pre-seeded customer

test-method.name: testSearchForDeletedCustomerReturnsEmpty
test-method.description: Search for a non-existent customer returns no results

test-method.name: testBalanceDecreasesAfterWithdrawal
test-method.description: Balance decreases by the withdrawn amount after a successful withdrawal

test-method.name: testWithdrawFullBalance
test-method.description: Withdraw the full account balance

test-method.name: testWithdrawValidAmount
test-method.description: Withdraw a partial amount from a funded account

test-method.name: testWithdrawWithInsufficientBalance
test-method.description: Withdraw more than the available balance — transaction should fail

test-method.name: testWithdrawZeroAmount
test-method.description: Withdraw zero amount — should not be treated as a successful transaction

test-method.name: testBalanceIncreasesAfterDeposit
test-method.description: Balance increases by the deposited amount

test-method.name: testDepositInvalidAmount
test-method.description: Attempt to deposit an invalid amount (negative or zero); no success message should appear

test-method.name: testDepositInvalidAmount
test-method.description: Attempt to deposit an invalid amount (negative or zero); no success message should appear

test-method.name: testDepositValidAmount
test-method.description: Deposit a valid amount and verify balance increases and success message appears

test-method.name: testDepositValidAmount
test-method.description: Deposit a valid amount and verify balance increases and success message appears

test-method.name: testDepositValidAmount
test-method.description: Deposit a valid amount and verify balance increases and success message appears

test-method.name: testBackButtonReturnsToDashboard
test-method.description: Back button on the Transactions page returns to the customer dashboard

test-method.name: testTransactionHistoryIsReadOnly
test-method.description: Transaction history table is read-only — no editable input fields present

test-method.name: testTransactionHistoryPageIsAccessible
test-method.description: Transaction history page is accessible from the customer dashboard

test-method.name: testCustomerDropdownVisible
test-method.description: Customer dropdown is visible on the login page

test-method.name: testLoginButtonDisabledBeforeSelection
test-method.description: Login button should be disabled before a customer is selected

test-method.name: testLoginWithValidCustomer
test-method.description: Login with a valid customer name and verify the dashboard loads

test-method.name: testLoginWithValidCustomer
test-method.description: Login with a valid customer name and verify the dashboard loads

test-method.name: testLoginWithValidCustomer
test-method.description: Login with a valid customer name and verify the dashboard loads

test-method.name: testLoginWithValidCustomer
test-method.description: Login with a valid customer name and verify the dashboard loads

test-method.name: testLoginWithValidCustomer
test-method.description: Login with a valid customer name and verify the dashboard loads

test-method.name: testLogoutReturnsToHomePage
test-method.description: Logout from dashboard returns to home page
